reasoning: `va_1g_valid` has `#[verifier(when_used_as_spec(spec_va_2m_valid))]` instead of `spec_va_1g_valid`. This is a copy-paste bug — in spec contexts `va_1g_valid(va)` resolves to `spec_va_2m_valid(va)`, silently weakening 1G address validation. This affects `wf_mapping_1g` which uses `va_1g_valid` as a guard on the mapping domain.
